records.sql:
SELECT localisation, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS nombre_patients_distincts
FROM diagnostics
GROUP BY localisation

SELECT stade_global, COUNT(*) AS nombre_diagnostics
FROM diagnostics
GROUP BY stade_global
SELECT COUNT(patient_id) FROM patients WHERE statut_vital = 'Décédé'

SELECT categorie, COUNT(*) AS nombre_employes
FROM employes
GROUP BY categorie
SELECT COUNT(service_id) AS nombre_services FROM services

SELECT m.nom 
FROM medicaments m 
JOIN stocks s ON m.medicament_id = s.medicament_id 
WHERE s.quantite < s.seuil_alerte

SELECT classe, COUNT(medicament_id) AS nombre_medicaments
FROM medicaments
GROUP BY classe
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM factures WHERE statut = 'impaye'

SELECT groupe_sanguin, COUNT(patient_id) AS nombre_de_patients
FROM patients
GROUP BY groupe_sanguin

SELECT sexe, COUNT(patient_id) AS nombre_patients
FROM patients
GROUP BY sexe

SELECT type, COUNT(traitement_id) AS nombre_de_traitements
FROM traitements
GROUP BY type

SELECT complications, COUNT(*) AS nombre_de_chirurgies
FROM chirurgies
GROUP BY complications

SELECT metier, COUNT(*) AS nombre_employes
FROM employes
GROUP BY metier

SELECT type_contrat, COUNT(*) AS nombre_contrats
FROM contrats
GROUP BY type_contrat
SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS nombre_absences FROM absences GROUP BY type

SELECT nom, prix_unitaire_eur 
FROM medicaments 
ORDER BY prix_unitaire_eur DESC 
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', date) AS mois,
    COUNT(*) AS nombre_seances
FROM 
    seances_radio
WHERE 
    strftime('%Y', date) = '2026'
GROUP BY 
    mois
ORDER BY 
    mois

SELECT localisation 
FROM diagnostics 
GROUP BY localisation 
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) > 40

SELECT s.nom AS service, SUM(c.salaire_brut_mensuel) AS masse_salariale_mensuelle
FROM services s
JOIN employes e ON s.service_id = e.service_id
JOIN contrats c ON e.employe_id = c.employe_id
WHERE c.date_fin > CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY s.service_id

SELECT d.localisation, COUNT(p.patient_id) AS nombre_decedes
FROM patients p
JOIN diagnostics d ON p.patient_id = d.patient_id
WHERE p.statut_vital = 'Décédé'
GROUP BY d.localisation

SELECT AVG(julianday(date_sortie) - julianday(date_entree)) AS duree_moyenne_jours
FROM sejours
WHERE type_sejour = 'hospitalisation_complete'

SELECT SUM(montant_total_eur) AS montant_total_facture, SUM(reste_a_charge_eur) AS reste_a_charge_total
FROM factures
WHERE statut = 'impaye'

SELECT s.service_id, s.nom, COUNT(e.employe_id) AS nb_employes_medicaux
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN employes e ON s.service_id = e.service_id AND e.metier = 'Médecin'
GROUP BY s.service_id, s.nom

SELECT e.nom, e.prenom, COUNT(p.patient_id) AS nb_patients
FROM employes e
JOIN patients p ON e.employe_id = p.medecin_referent_id
GROUP BY e.employe_id
ORDER BY nb_patients DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT localisation, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS nombre_patients
FROM diagnostics
GROUP BY localisation

SELECT stade_global, COUNT(*) AS nombre_diagnostics
FROM diagnostics
GROUP BY stade_global
SELECT COUNT(patient_id) FROM patients WHERE statut_vital = 'Décédé'

SELECT categorie, COUNT(employe_id) AS nombre_employes
FROM employes
GROUP BY categorie
SELECT COUNT(service_id) AS nombre_services FROM services
SELECT m.nom FROM medicaments m JOIN stocks s ON m.medicament_id = s.medicament_id WHERE s.quantite < s.seuil_alerte

SELECT classe, COUNT(*) AS nombre_medicaments
FROM medicaments
GROUP BY classe
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM factures WHERE statut = 'Impayée'

SELECT groupe_sanguin, COUNT(patient_id) AS nombre_patients
FROM patients
GROUP BY groupe_sanguin

SELECT sexe, COUNT(patient_id) AS nombre_de_patients
FROM patients
GROUP BY sexe

SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS nombre_de_traitements
FROM traitements
GROUP BY type

SELECT complications, COUNT(*) AS nombre_chirurgies
FROM chirurgies
GROUP BY complications

SELECT metier, COUNT(employe_id) AS nombre_employes
FROM employes
GROUP BY metier

SELECT type_contrat, COUNT(*) AS nombre_contrats
FROM contrats
GROUP BY type_contrat
SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS nombre_absences FROM absences GROUP BY type
SELECT nom, prix_unitaire_eur FROM medicaments ORDER BY prix_unitaire_eur DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', date) AS mois, COUNT(*) AS nombre_seances
FROM seances_radio
WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '2026'
GROUP BY mois
ORDER BY mois

SELECT localisation 
FROM diagnostics 
GROUP BY localisation 
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) > 40

SELECT s.nom AS service, SUM(c.salaire_brut_mensuel) AS masse_salariale_mensuelle
FROM services s
JOIN employes e ON s.service_id = e.service_id
JOIN contrats c ON e.employe_id = c.employe_id
WHERE c.date_fin IS NULL
GROUP BY s.service_id

SELECT d.localisation, COUNT(p.patient_id) AS nombre_decedes
FROM diagnostics d
JOIN patients p ON d.patient_id = p.patient_id
WHERE p.statut_vital = 'Décédé'
GROUP BY d.localisation

SELECT AVG(julianday(date_sortie) - julianday(date_entree)) AS duree_moyenne_jours
FROM sejours
WHERE type_sejour = 'Hospitalisation'

SELECT SUM(montant_total_eur) AS montant_total_facture, SUM(reste_a_charge_eur) AS reste_a_charge_total 
FROM factures 
WHERE statut = 'Impayée'

SELECT s.nom AS service, COUNT(e.employe_id) AS nb_employes_medicaux
FROM services s
JOIN employes e ON s.service_id = e.service_id AND e.categorie = 'Medical'
GROUP BY s.service_id

SELECT medecin_referent_id AS employe_id, COUNT(patient_id) AS nb_patients
FROM patients
GROUP BY medecin_referent_id
ORDER BY nb_patients DESC
LIMIT 5
SELECT localisation, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) FROM diagnostics GROUP BY localisation LIMIT 200
SELECT stade_global, COUNT(*) FROM diagnostics GROUP BY stade_global LIMIT 200
SELECT COUNT(patient_id) FROM patients WHERE statut_vital = 'Décédé' LIMIT 200
SELECT categorie ,  COUNT(*) FROM employes GROUP BY categorie LIMIT 200
SELECT COUNT(service_id) FROM services
SELECT T1.nom FROM medicaments AS T1 JOIN stocks AS T2 ON T1.medicament_id = T2.medicament_id WHERE T2.quantite < T2.seuil_alerte LIMIT 200
SELECT classe, COUNT(*) FROM medicaments GROUP BY classe LIMIT 200
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM factures WHERE statut = 'En attente'
SELECT groupe_sanguin, COUNT(*) FROM patients GROUP BY groupe_sanguin LIMIT 200
SELECT sexe, COUNT(patient_id) FROM patients GROUP BY sexe LIMIT 200
SELECT type ,  COUNT(*) FROM traitements GROUP BY type LIMIT 200
SELECT complications, COUNT(*) FROM chirurgies GROUP BY complications LIMIT 200
SELECT metier, COUNT(employe_id) FROM employes GROUP BY metier LIMIT 200
SELECT type_contrat, COUNT(*) FROM contrats GROUP BY type_contrat LIMIT 200
SELECT type, COUNT(*) FROM absences GROUP BY type LIMIT 200
SELECT nom FROM medicaments ORDER BY prix_unitaire_eur DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', date) AS mois, COUNT(*) AS nombre_seances FROM seances_radio WHERE date LIKE '2026%' GROUP BY mois ORDER BY mois
SELECT localisation FROM diagnostics GROUP BY localisation HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) > 40

SELECT s.nom AS service, SUM(c.salaire_brut_mensuel) AS masse_salariale_mensuelle 
FROM services s 
JOIN employes e ON s.service_id = e.service_id 
JOIN contrats c ON e.employe_id = c.employe_id 
WHERE c.date_fin IS NULL 
GROUP BY s.service_id
SELECT localisation, COUNT(patient_id) AS nombre_decedes FROM diagnostics WHERE stade_global = 'Décès' GROUP BY localisation LIMIT 200
SELECT AVG(date_sortie - date_entree) FROM sejours WHERE type_sejour = 'Hôpital de jour'
SELECT SUM(montant_total_eur) AS montant_total_facture, SUM(reste_a_charge_eur) AS reste_a_charge_total FROM factures WHERE statut = 'En attente' LIMIT 200

SELECT services.nom, COUNT(employes.employe_id) AS nb_employes_medicaux FROM employes JOIN services ON employes.service_id = services.service_id WHERE employes.metier = 'Oncologue' GROUP BY services.service_id
SELECT employe_id, COUNT(patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM patients GROUP BY employe_id ORDER BY nb_patients DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT localisation, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM diagnostics GROUP BY localisation ORDER BY nb_patients DESC
SELECT stade_global, COUNT(DISTINCT diagnostic_id) AS nb_diagnostics FROM diagnostics GROUP BY stade_global ORDER BY nb_diagnostics DESC
SELECT COUNT(patient_id) FROM patients WHERE statut_vital = 'Décédé'
SELECT categorie, COUNT(employe_id) AS nombre_employes FROM employes GROUP BY categorie
SELECT COUNT(service_id) AS nombre_services FROM services
SELECT m.nom, s.quantite, s.seuil_alerte FROM stocks s JOIN medicaments m ON m.medicament_id = s.medicament_id WHERE s.quantite < s.seuil_alerte ORDER BY s.quantite
SELECT classe, COUNT(*) AS nb_medicaments FROM medicaments GROUP BY classe ORDER BY nb_medicaments DESC
SELECT COUNT(facture_id) FROM factures WHERE statut = 'Impaye'
SELECT groupe_sanguin, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM patients GROUP BY groupe_sanguin ORDER BY nb_patients DESC
SELECT sexe, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM patients GROUP BY sexe
SELECT type, COUNT(traitement_id) AS nombre FROM traitements GROUP BY type ORDER BY nombre DESC
SELECT complications, COUNT(*) AS nb_chirurgies FROM chirurgies GROUP BY complications ORDER BY nb_chirurgies DESC
SELECT metier, COUNT(*) AS nb_employees FROM employes GROUP BY metier ORDER BY nb_employees DESC
SELECT type_contrat, COUNT(*) AS nombre_contrats FROM contrats WHERE date_fin IS NULL GROUP BY type_contrat ORDER BY nombre_contrats DESC
SELECT type, COUNT(absence_id) AS nb_absences FROM absences GROUP BY type ORDER BY nb_absences DESC
SELECT nom, prix_unitaire_eur FROM medicaments ORDER BY prix_unitaire_eur DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', date) AS mois, COUNT(seance_id) AS nb_seances FROM seances_radio WHERE date >= '2026-01-01' GROUP BY mois ORDER BY mois

SELECT localisation FROM diagnostics WHERE patient_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM diagnostics ) GROUP BY localisation HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) > 40 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) DESC

SELECT se.nom AS service, SUM(c.salaire_brut_mensuel) AS masse_salariale FROM contrats c JOIN employes e ON e.employe_id = c.employe_id JOIN services se ON se.service_id = e.service_id WHERE c.date_fin IS NULL GROUP BY se.nom ORDER BY masse_salariale DESC

SELECT d.localisation, COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM diagnostics d JOIN patients p ON p.patient_id = d.patient_id WHERE p.statut_vital = 'Décédé' GROUP BY d.localisation ORDER BY nb_patients DESC
SELECT AVG((strftime('%J', date_sortie) - strftime('%J', date_entree))) AS duree_moyenne FROM sejours WHERE type_sejour = 'Hospitalisation complète'
SELECT SUM(montant_total_eur) AS montant_facture, SUM(reste_a_charge_eur) AS reste_a_charge FROM factures WHERE statut = 'Impayée'
SELECT s.nom AS service, COUNT(e.employe_id) AS nb_employes FROM services s JOIN employes e ON e.service_id = s.service_id WHERE e.metier = 'Médecin' GROUP BY s.nom ORDER BY nb_employes DESC
SELECT e.nom, e.prenom, COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM patients p JOIN employes e ON e.employe_id = p.medecin_referent_id GROUP BY e.employe_id ORDER BY nb_patients DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT localisation, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM diagnostics GROUP BY localisation ORDER BY nb_patients DESC
SELECT stade_global, COUNT(*) AS n FROM diagnostics GROUP BY stade_global
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM patients WHERE statut_vital = 'Décédé'
SELECT categorie, COUNT(*) AS n FROM employes GROUP BY categorie
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM services
SELECT m.nom, s.quantite, s.seuil_alerte FROM stocks s JOIN medicaments m ON m.medicament_id = s.medicament_id WHERE s.quantite < s.seuil_alerte ORDER BY s.quantite
SELECT classe, COUNT(*) AS n FROM medicaments GROUP BY classe
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM factures WHERE statut = 'Impayée'
SELECT groupe_sanguin, COUNT(*) AS n FROM patients GROUP BY groupe_sanguin ORDER BY n DESC
SELECT sexe, COUNT(*) AS n FROM patients GROUP BY sexe
SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS n FROM traitements GROUP BY type
SELECT complications, COUNT(*) AS n FROM chirurgies WHERE complications != '' GROUP BY complications
SELECT metier, COUNT(*) AS n FROM employes GROUP BY metier
SELECT type_contrat, COUNT(*) AS n FROM contrats GROUP BY type_contrat
SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS n FROM absences GROUP BY type
SELECT nom, prix_unitaire_eur FROM medicaments ORDER BY prix_unitaire_eur DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', date) AS mois, COUNT(*) AS n FROM seances_radio WHERE date >= '2026-01-01' AND date < '2027-01-01' GROUP BY mois ORDER BY julianday(date)
SELECT localisation FROM diagnostics AS T1 JOIN patients AS T2 ON T1.patient_id = T2.patient_id GROUP BY localisation HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.patient_id) > 40

SELECT se.nom AS service, SUM(c.salaire_brut_mensuel) AS masse_salariale FROM contrats c JOIN employes e ON e.employe_id = c.employe_id JOIN services se ON se.service_id = e.service_id WHERE c.date_fin IS NULL GROUP BY se.nom ORDER BY masse_salariale DESC
SELECT d.localisation, COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) AS n FROM patients p JOIN diagnostics d ON d.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE p.statut_vital = 'Décédé' GROUP BY d.localisation
SELECT AVG(julianday(date_sortie) - julianday(date_entree)) AS duree FROM sejours WHERE type_sejour = 'Hospitalisation'
SELECT SUM(montant_total_eur) AS montant_facture, SUM(reste_a_charge_eur) AS reste_a_charge FROM factures WHERE statut = 'Impayée'
SELECT s.nom AS service, COUNT(e.employe_id) AS nb_medecins FROM employes e JOIN services s ON s.service_id = e.service_id WHERE e.metier = 'Medical' GROUP BY s.service_id ORDER BY nb_medecins DESC
SELECT medecin_referent_id, COUNT(*) AS n FROM patients WHERE medecin_referent_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY medecin_referent_id ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 5
